subtitle: Guidelines and rules for collecting customer feedback across territories.

content.heading: General Guidelines
paragraphs: All feedback must be collected immediately after the call HCP interaction to ensure accuracy.
Ensure the target persona is correctly identified before logging the feedback entry.

content.heading: Validation Rules
paragraphs: The 'Updated By' field must match a valid system username.
Feedback entries without a timestamp will be automatically rejected by the data pipeline.

content.heading: Escalation Process
paragraphs: In case of conflicting feedback, the territory lead must be notified within 24 hours.
Standard escalation protocols apply to all 'RYB-LAZ' brand interactions.
